title: Operation Al Dente
summary: Nonna Rossi is relocating her trattoria. The only available route cuts through a deck with notoriously unstable grav-plating. She wants her ancient-earth sourdough-starter and her machines safe

cast.name: Nonna Rossi
cast.want: To keep the ravioli from overcooking, regardless of physics.

cast.name: The Iron Press
cast.want: To drift blindly into fragile ship systems.

scenes.desc: The gravity plating fails. Nonna tries to catch her ravioli while the press is drifting towards a gasline.

rewards.desc: Nonna Rossi. Infinite Pasta and high-society gossip.
